title: Sweet & Creamy Rose Petal Indian Stir-fry
description: A floral and tender kid-friendly Indian dish featuring clear honey in a creamy sauce thats both sweet and mild enough for young palates.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse the rice and soak it in water for at least an hour.
Saute raw onions, sliced green chili peppers, and finely chopped garlic in a pan over medium heat until translucent. Add the tomato chunks and sauté until soft, then reduce to simmer for 5 minutes.
Add saffron strands if using, followed by garam masala powder and cumin powder. Stir well and cook for another minute. Slowly pour in coconut milk while stirring continuously.
Let it simmer gently on low heat for about 10 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt as needed.
Meanwhile, cook the rice according to package instructions or soak overnight, then drain and rinse before cooking. Add a pinch of salt during boiling stage.
Serve the sweet & creamy rose petal Indian stir-fry over steamed rice for a complete meal. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
